LanguageData.ABY_CircleMilestone_CommandReady: Invocation path clear. A prepared sigil, operator, and circle state are all valid.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleMilestone_NextFinal: This ritual already sits at the current top of the escalation ladder.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleMilestone_StageFromVault: Stage a prepared sigil from the linked vault before beginning the invocation.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleCommandReady: Invocation path clear. Prepared sigil, operator, and circle state are valid.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Unstable: Guaranteed: residue and cleanup drops from a controlled early breach.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Unstable: Progression: teaches the circle loop before the first boss tier.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Ember: Guaranteed: residue, beast cleanup loot, and a stronger hunter-pack rehearsal.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Ember: Progression: stress-tests backline defense before mini-boss escalation.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Warden: Guaranteed: 1 Ashen Core plus residue from the first true mini-boss step.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Warden: Progression: opens the first ashbound weapon and implant branch.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Archon: Guaranteed: Herald Core Fragments and an Archon Override Ampoule from the first true boss.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Archon: Progression: clears the first boss gate and makes herald-side follow-up routes matter.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Choir: Guaranteed: 1 Choir Resonance Core and a heavier residue payout.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Choir: Progression: unlocks the support-oriented reward line built around Choir implants and the Canticle Driver.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Reactor: Guaranteed: 1 Reactor Saint Core, residue, and spacer-grade salvage.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Reactor: Progression: feeds saint-class fabrication and pushes the colony toward late-game escalation.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Dominion: Guaranteed: dominion outcome rewards, shards, and late-stage progression materials if the breach is contained.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Dominion: Progression: arms the full dominion crisis ladder and outcome routing.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardFollowUp_Final: Follow-up: this is already the current apex ritual track.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeMilestone_PatternComplete: All current patterns in this category are attuned.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeMilestone_AttunementComplete: The lattice already sits at the current attunement capstone.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeMilestone_BlockerPower: No powered forge is online. Reactivate the lattice before relying on attunement effects.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeMilestone_BlockerResidue: No loose residue is available on this map. Recover more before pushing the next unlock.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeMilestone_BlockerOfferMore: Offer {0} more residue to reach the next pattern.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeMilestone_BlockerClear: Residue routing is clear. Materials and bills now determine output.
LanguageData.ABY_ProgressRecap_Archon_Desc:
The archon threshold has been broken.
{0} now becomes forge-reachable at {1} attuned residue, while {2} sits one step higher at {3}. Herald core fragments now matter as real progression currency, and the clean next route is to keep feeding the forge, decode herald-side follow-up, and escalate into the post-first-boss support branch before saint-class invocation.
LanguageData.ABY_ProgressRecap_Reactor_Desc:
The saint-tier threshold has been broken.
Reactor saint cores now feed {0}, {1}, and the heavier saint-side fabrication line. If {2} is prepared, dominion sigils become forge-reachable at {3} attuned residue for the next deliberate escalation beyond the current boss ladder.
